The Event

Where Culture Meets Elegance

High Tea with a Twist is an intimate, curated experience fusing the beauty and boldness of Afro-Caribbean culture with the tradition of British high tea. A curated afternoon designed for women who are intentional about how they show up in life.

An Afternoon of
Financial Wellness
Social Wellness
Mental Wellness

Meet Your Host

Oyin

Founder, Busy Mamas Network · @oyindababz

Oyin is a Canadian lifestyle and motherhood content creator, community builder, and the founder of the Busy Mamas Network — a thriving community for millennial moms across Canada. With an engaged following across Instagram and TikTok, Oyin creates content at the intersection of faith, motherhood, finances, and intentional living.
